title: Opinion: RFK Jr.’s antidepressant deprescribing push gets one thing right — and others dangerously wrong
summary: “Deprescribing requires gradual tapering, psychological support, careful risk stratification, and accessible alternatives — none of which Kennedy’s initiative provides at scale.”
